  "findings": [
    "Frayed and burned webbing on fall protection equipment, which severely compromises its structural integrity and load-bearing capacity."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the damaged fall protection equipment from service.",
    "Tag the equipment as unusable and destroy/discard it to prevent accidental reuse.",
    "Replace with compliant, fully inspected fall protection equipment before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1926 Subpart M (specifically 1926.502) and 1910.140, personal fall arrest systems must be inspected prior to each use for wear, damage, and other deterioration. Any component with significant damage, such as frayed or burned webbing, must be immediately removed from service as it cannot be relied upon to support the required arrest forces.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.502(d)(21)",
    "OSHA 1910.140(c)(18)"
  ]
}
